summary: Campaign creation bug fix verified. Backend API POST /api/campaigns/{user_id} works correctly (7/7 tests passed). Frontend Create button IS clickable and functional - validation toasts now display correctly using showToast instead of Alert.alert. Discovered that tags not loading is caused by user session not being available in localStorage when campaigns/new page loads (likely a session persistence issue with IndexedDB/cookie-based auth). The original bug (Create button not clickable) appears to be FIXED - button is clickable and shows validation toasts.

ui_bugs.issue: Tags not loading - investigation revealed localStorage.getItem('user') returns null even when logged in. User session appears to be stored in cookies/IndexedDB but not in localStorage when navigating to /campaigns/new. The useEffect for fetching tags depends on user?._id from Zustand store, which may not be populated. This is a session persistence issue, not a SmartTagPicker component bug.

action_items: ORIGINAL BUG APPEARS FIXED: Create button is clickable and showToast validation messages display correctly

SECONDARY ISSUE: User session not available in localStorage on /campaigns/new page - localStorage.getItem('user') returns null. Check if useAuthStore.loadAuth() is being called before campaigns/new component mounts, or add fallback to fetch user from IndexedDB/cookie
Verify tags load correctly when user data is available - tags API works correctly, issue is user._id being undefined in useEffect
critical_code_review_comments: ORIGINAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: handleSave() at line 315-379 now uses showToast() instead of Alert.alert() for all validation messages
Create button at line 489 has data-testid='create-campaign-btn' and is styled as blue pill button - CLICKABLE
Tags useEffect (line 76-84) depends on user?._id - if user session not loaded, tags won't fetch
localStorage check showed user=null, token=null - session persistence issue with cookie/IndexedDB auth not restoring to Zustand store
Backend campaign creation API works correctly - tested with 7 test cases all passing

success_rate.frontend: Partial - Create button clickable, validation toasts working, but tags not loading prevents full flow

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test campaigns via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The original bug (Create button not clickable) was FIXED - button IS clickable and shows validation toasts correctly. However, during testing we discovered that tags are not loading because the user session is not available in localStorage (localStorage.getItem('user') returns null). The app uses cookie/IndexedDB-based auth which isn't being restored to the Zustand store before the campaigns/new component mounts. When manually testing with curl using a known user_id, all APIs work correctly. The tags API GET /api/tags/{user_id} returns 10 tags, campaign creation POST /api/campaigns/{user_id} returns 200. To fully test the campaign creation flow in the UI, the auth session persistence issue needs to be resolved first so that user._id is available to the tags useEffect.

frontend_ui.Validation toasts: PASS - Shows 'Please select a trigger tag' correctly
frontend_ui.Tags loading: FAIL - Shows 'No tags found' instead of available tags
